market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: 10-Bed Aparthouse w/ Hot Tub & Free Parking
analysis.rewritten_desc: This 10-bedroom home offers luxury for up to 4 guests in a prime [Location]. Highlighted features include a private hot tub for relaxation after a day of exploration, plus free parking for all guests' convenience. Rated 4.95 from 98 reviews, the property ensures top-tier comfort despite its high capacity. The rate is £661/night, 328% above the local median of £154.60, making it best suited for private groups seeking exclusivity. Currently 38% booked for the next 90 days (56 open nights), this home is ideal for those prioritizing parking access and outdoor leisure. All amenities are provided for a self-contained stay, though specific room details are best experienced firsthand. Note: While the listing lacks explicit amenity tags, the presence of a hot tub and parking position it as a unique luxury option in [Location].
analysis.photo_order_rec: The hot tub should lead the gallery photo. Outdoor amenities like hot tubs typically generate the highest guest interest at 42%
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate £661 is +328% above cohort median £154.60 while occupancy is 38% vs cohort 47.8%
Title lacks SEO keyword density (only 2/5 primary selling points prioritized)
Description is completely blank - no content to address concerns about 10 beds for 4 guests
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £661 rate is 328% above local average while occupancy is 13% below market median - let's close the efficiency gap
